pub mod archmage::testing
pub enum archmage::testing::CompileTimePolicy
pub archmage::testing::CompileTimePolicy::Fail
pub archmage::testing::CompileTimePolicy::Warn
pub archmage::testing::CompileTimePolicy::WarnStderr
impl core::clone::Clone for archmage::testing::CompileTimePolicy
pub fn archmage::testing::CompileTimePolicy::clone(&self) -> archmage::testing::CompileTimePolicy
impl core::cmp::Eq for archmage::testing::CompileTimePolicy
impl core::cmp::PartialEq for archmage::testing::CompileTimePolicy
pub fn archmage::testing::CompileTimePolicy::eq(&self, &archmage::testing::CompileTimePolicy) -> bool
impl core::fmt::Debug for archmage::testing::CompileTimePolicy
pub fn archmage::testing::CompileTimePolicy::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::marker::Copy for archmage::testing::CompileTimePolicy
impl core::marker::StructuralPartialEq for archmage::testing::CompileTimePolicy
impl core::marker::Freeze for archmage::testing::CompileTimePolicy
impl core::marker::Send for archmage::testing::CompileTimePolicy
impl core::marker::Sync for archmage::testing::CompileTimePolicy
impl core::marker::Unpin for archmage::testing::CompileTimePolicy
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for archmage::testing::CompileTimePolicy
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for archmage::testing::CompileTimePolicy
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for archmage::testing::CompileTimePolicy
pub struct archmage::testing::PermutationReport
pub archmage::testing::PermutationReport::permutations_run: usize
pub archmage::testing::PermutationReport::warnings: alloc::vec::Vec<alloc::string::String>
impl core::clone::Clone for archmage::testing::PermutationReport
pub fn archmage::testing::PermutationReport::clone(&self) -> archmage::testing::PermutationReport
impl core::fmt::Debug for archmage::testing::PermutationReport
pub fn archmage::testing::PermutationReport::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::fmt::Display for archmage::testing::PermutationReport
pub fn archmage::testing::PermutationReport::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result

pub trait archmage::SimdToken: archmage::tokens::sealed::Sealed + core::marker::Copy + core::clone::Clone + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync + 'static
pub const archmage::SimdToken::DISABLE_TARGET_FEATURES: &'static str
pub const archmage::SimdToken::ENABLE_TARGET_FEATURES: &'static str
pub const archmage::SimdToken::NAME: &'static str
pub const archmage::SimdToken::TARGET_FEATURES: &'static str
pub fn archmage::SimdToken::attempt() -> core::option::Option<Self>
pub fn archmage::SimdToken::compiled_with() -> core::option::Option<bool>
pub fn archmage::SimdToken::guaranteed() -> core::option::Option<bool>
pub fn archmage::SimdToken::name(&self) -> &'static str
pub fn archmage::SimdToken::summon() -> core::option::Option<Self>
impl archmage::tokens::SimdToken for archmage::tokens::Arm64V2Token
pub const archmage::tokens::Arm64V2Token::DISABLE_TARGET_FEATURES: &'static str
pub const archmage::tokens::Arm64V2Token::ENABLE_TARGET_FEATURES: &'static str
pub const archmage::tokens::Arm64V2Token::NAME: &'static str
pub const archmage::tokens::Arm64V2Token::TARGET_FEATURES: &'static str
pub fn archmage::tokens::Arm64V2Token::attempt() -> core::option::Option<Self>
pub fn archmage::tokens::Arm64V2Token::compiled_with() -> core::option::Option<bool>
pub fn archmage::tokens::Arm64V2Token::guaranteed() -> core::option::Option<bool>
pub fn archmage::tokens::Arm64V2Token::name(&self) -> &'static str

pub mod archmage::tokens

pub fn archmage::tokens::Arm64V2Token::as_arm_v2(self) -> core::option::Option<archmage::tokens::Arm64V2Token>
pub fn archmage::tokens::Arm64V2Token::as_arm_v3(self) -> core::option::Option<archmage::tokens::Arm64V3Token>

pub trait archmage::SimdToken: archmage::tokens::sealed::Sealed + core::marker::Copy + core::clone::Clone + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync + 'static
pub const archmage::SimdToken::DISABLE_TARGET_FEATURES: &'static str
pub const archmage::SimdToken::ENABLE_TARGET_FEATURES: &'static str
pub const archmage::SimdToken::NAME: &'static str
pub const archmage::SimdToken::TARGET_FEATURES: &'static str
pub fn archmage::SimdToken::attempt() -> core::option::Option<Self>
pub fn archmage::SimdToken::compiled_with() -> core::option::Option<bool>
pub fn archmage::SimdToken::guaranteed() -> core::option::Option<bool>
pub fn archmage::SimdToken::name(&self) -> &'static str
pub fn archmage::SimdToken::summon() -> core::option::Option<Self>
impl archmage::tokens::SimdToken for archmage::tokens::Arm64V2Token
pub const archmage::tokens::Arm64V2Token::DISABLE_TARGET_FEATURES: &'static str
pub const archmage::tokens::Arm64V2Token::ENABLE_TARGET_FEATURES: &'static str
pub const archmage::tokens::Arm64V2Token::NAME: &'static str
pub const archmage::tokens::Arm64V2Token::TARGET_FEATURES: &'static str
pub fn archmage::tokens::Arm64V2Token::attempt() -> core::option::Option<Self>
pub fn archmage::tokens::Arm64V2Token::compiled_with() -> core::option::Option<bool>
pub fn archmage::tokens::Arm64V2Token::guaranteed() -> core::option::Option<bool>
pub fn archmage::tokens::Arm64V2Token::name(&self) -> &'static str
pub fn archmage::tokens::Arm64V2Token::summon() -> core::option::Option<Self>
impl archmage::tokens::SimdToken for archmage::tokens::Arm64V3Token

pub fn archmage::dangerously_disable_tokens_except_wasm(bool) -> core::result::Result<(), archmage::tokens::DisableAllSimdError>
pub type archmage::Arm64 = archmage::tokens::NeonToken
pub type archmage::Avx2FmaToken = archmage::tokens::X64V3Token
pub type archmage::Avx512Token = archmage::tokens::X64V4Token
pub type archmage::Desktop64 = archmage::tokens::X64V3Token
pub type archmage::Server64 = archmage::tokens::X64V4Token
pub type archmage::Sse2Token = archmage::tokens::X64V1Token
